title: Human Review
description: Optional file written by a human after a cycle. Loaded by future Search cycles as scored signal.

score.description: Overall keep-or-kill signal. 1 = bury this direction, 10 = do more like this.

axis_scores.description: Optional finer-grained scores. Same axes as Verify.

do_more_of.description: Concrete things the next cycle should keep doing.

do_less_of.description: Concrete things the next cycle should stop doing.

free_form.description: Anything else. Long-form notes, gut reactions, ideas to try.

tags.description: Optional labels. Search agent can group reviews by tag.
